on_start.default: We start exercising, squats. We start exercising standing.

on_end.default: Great, we're done with the squats.
on_end.end1_part2: we will look forward to our future training.

on_warning.squat_rozpaz: Please move your feet apart a little.

both_hands.V_drepe_predpazene_ruky_vysoko_a_odseba: Bring your arms closer together and into a lower position.
both_hands.V_drepe_predpazene_ruky_nizko_a_odseba: Bring your arms closer together and into a higher position.
both_hands.V_drepe_predpazene_ruky_nizko: Raise your arms to a higher position.
both_hands.V_drepe_predpazene_ruky_zle: Raise your arms to a horizontal position at the level of your shoulders.

right_hand.V_drepe_prava_ruka_nespravne: Bring your right hand closer to your left.

left_hand.V_drepe_lava_ruka_nespravne: Bring your left hand closer to your right.

on_warning.default: Try to hold your arm better.

on_phase.phase1: Do a squat and put your arms forward.
